name: Texas Caviar (Black-eyed Pea Salad)
recipeIngredient: 2 tablespoons Canned Jalapeno Peppers, Finely Chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Sort the black-eyed peas and soak overnight in 6 cups of water.
2. Drain the peas.
3. Cook the peas in 4 cups of fresh water until done but still firm, about 1 1/2 hours.
4. Rinse the cooked peas in cold water and drain.
5. In a medium bowl, combine all remaining ingredients and mix well.
6. Add the cooked peas to the bowl and chill.
Nutrition Per Serving:
113 Calories Protein 5 Grams Carbohydrates 13 Grams Total Fat 5 Grams Saturated Fat 1 Gram Polyunsaturated Fat 3 Grams Monounsaturated Fat 1 Gram Cholesterol 0 Milligrams Sodium 39 Milligrams Potassium 199 Milligrams Calcium 18 Milligrams.
